name: Phoenix
comment:
# Basic Usage

@docs listen, update, join, push, subscribe

values.name: join
values.comment: Joins a channel
values.type: (Msg msg -> msg) -> Channel msg -> Socket msg -> ( Socket msg, Cmd msg )

values.name: listen
values.comment: Listens to socket change and timers
values.type: (Msg msg -> msg) -> Socket msg -> Sub msg

values.name: push
values.comment: Pushes a a message
values.type: (Msg msg -> msg) -> Push msg -> Socket msg -> ( Socket msg, Cmd msg )

values.name: subscribe
values.comment:
Subscribes to a channel

It's different than join and only Subscribes to a channel events without triggering join on remote server
values.type: (Msg msg -> msg) -> Channel msg -> Socket msg -> ( Socket msg, Cmd msg )

values.name: update
values.comment: Updates socket model and send messages
values.type: (Msg msg -> msg) -> Msg msg -> Socket msg -> ( Socket msg, Cmd msg )

name: Phoenix.Socket
comment:
# This module provides an interface for connecting to Phoenix Socket

@docs Socket, init, update, join, listen, push, withLongPoll, subscribe

aliases.name: Socket
aliases.type: { endPoint : String, channels : Dict String (Channel msg), serializer : Serializer, transport : Transport, pushedEvents : Dict Int (Push msg), heartbeatIntervalSeconds : Float, heartbeatTimestamp : Float, heartbeatReplyTimestamp : Float, longPollToken : Maybe String, ref : Int, readyState : State, withDebug : Bool, withoutHeartbeat : Bool }

values.name: init
values.comment: Initializes Socket using the websocket address

values.name: join
values.comment:
Joins a channel
Adds the channel to the socket model and returns a command that sends data
values.type: Channel msg -> Socket msg -> ( Socket msg, Cmd (Msg msg) )

values.name: listen
values.comment: Listens to socket
values.type: (Msg msg -> msg) -> Socket msg -> Sub msg

values.name: push
values.comment: pushs a message
values.type: Push msg -> Socket msg -> ( Socket msg, Cmd (Msg msg) )

values.name: subscribe
values.comment:
Subscribes to a channel events
Adds the channel to the socket model
values.type: Channel msg -> Socket msg -> ( Socket msg, Cmd (Msg msg) )

values.name: update
values.comment: Handles Phoenix Msg
values.type: (Msg msg -> msg) -> Msg msg -> Socket msg -> ( Socket msg, Cmd msg )

values.name: withLongPoll
values.comment: withLongPoll

name: Phoenix.Push
comment:
# This module provides an interface for pushed messages

@docs Push, init, initWithChannel, onError, onErrorCommand, onOk, onOkCommand, withPayload

aliases.name: Push
aliases.type: { event : String, topic : String, on : Dict String (Value -> msg), payload : Value }

values.name: init
values.comment: initializes Push with event name and the channel

values.name: initWithChannel
values.comment: initializes Push with event name and the channel

values.name: onError
values.comment: When Channel replies with errro this message gets triggred

values.name: onErrorCommand
values.comment: Convert a Error response to Message

values.name: onOk
values.comment: When Channel replies with ok this message gets triggred

values.name: onOkCommand
values.comment: Convert an Ok response to Message

values.name: withPayload
values.comment: Adds payload to Push

name: Phoenix.Message
comment:
# This module provides Msg that the package handles

@docs Msg, mapAll, none, toInternalMsg, toExternalMsg, extractInternalMsg, extractExternalMsg

unions.name: Msg
unions.comment:
This Msg should be used in user's main app

    import Phoenix.Message as PhxMsg

    type MyAppMsg =
        ..
        | PhoenixMsg (PhxMsg.Msg MyAppMsg)

name: Phoenix.Channel
comment:
# This module is keeping states related to channel

@docs Channel, init, setJoiningState, setClosedState, setJoinedState, setErroredState, isOngoing, isClosed, isJoined, isErrored, addChannel, updateChannel, updateChannelDict, findChannelWithRef, findChannel, on, onJoin, onJoinError, onError, onClose

aliases.name: Channel
aliases.type: { topic : String, on : Dict String (Value -> msg), state : State, joinRef : Maybe Int, receive : Dict String (Value -> msg), payload : Value }

values.name: addChannel
values.comment: Adds a channel to Dict of channels
values.type: Channel msg -> Dict String (Channel msg) -> Dict String (Channel msg)

values.name: findChannel
values.comment: Finds a channel in Dict of channels by its topic
values.type: String -> Dict String (Channel msg) -> Maybe (Channel msg)

values.name: findChannelWithRef
values.comment: Finds a channel with its topic and joinRef number
values.type: String -> Maybe Int -> Dict String (Channel msg) -> Maybe (Channel msg)

values.name: init
values.comment: Init channel model using channel topic

values.name: isClosed
values.comment: Is this channel closed ?

values.name: isErrored
values.comment: Is this channel faild to join

values.name: isJoined
values.comment: Is this channel joined successfully ?

values.name: isOngoing
values.comment: Returns true if state is Joined Joining

values.name: on
values.comment: Triggers this message when event is received
values.type: String -> (Value -> msg) -> Channel msg -> Channel msg

values.name: onClose
values.comment:
Triggers this message when channel is closed

onClose messages are invoked if the channel explicitly closed on the server.

values.name: onError
values.comment:
Triggers this message when failed to send join command on the connection

onError messages are invoked if the channel crashes on the server.

values.name: onJoin
values.comment: Triggers this message to send when joined a channel

values.name: onJoinError
values.comment: Triggers this message to send when failed to join a channel

values.name: setClosedState
values.comment: Sets stats to Closed

values.name: setErroredState
values.comment: Sets stats to Errored

values.name: setJoinedState
values.comment: Sets stats to joined state

values.name: setJoiningState
values.comment: Sets the joining reference and state to Joining

values.name: updateChannel
values.comment: Updates channel in the given Dict
values.type: Channel msg -> Dict String (Channel msg) -> Dict String (Channel msg)

values.name: updateChannelDict
values.type: Channel msg -> Dict String (Channel msg) -> Dict String (Channel msg)
